title: CVE-2026-10246: SourceCodester RCE
summary: [P1] A vulnerability in SourceCodester Pharmacy Sales and Inventory System allows for remote code execution. No patch is available, and exploitation status is unknown. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Vulnerability allows for remote code execution in a web application.

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog.

title: CVE-2026-49328: Apache UrlImageConverter SSRF
summary: [P1] A Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability in Apache UrlImageConverter allows for unauthorized access to internal resources. No patch is available, and exploitation status is unknown. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
